name: Stashed.in Extension
description: Save links directly to your Stashed.in boards from any webpage

dataInTransit.authentication: User authentication tokens for Stashed.in API
dataInTransit.websiteData: URLs, titles, descriptions, and images from webpages being saved

dataAtRest.authentication: API tokens stored locally in browser storage
dataAtRest.userContent: Saved link data cached temporarily in browser storage
